2026-06-11HCPatent ActAppointment of a member of the Patented Medicine Prices Review BoardAppointment of Conor McCourt of Vancouver, British Columbia, to be a member of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board
precis: Appointment of Conor McCourt of Vancouver, British Columbia, to be a member of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years.
